transcription.text: Going to do a quick overview on how to remove the rollover protection and the capping from
the body. There's a few little pitfalls I suppose to look out for. The bar work comes
out relatively easily straight out of the corner of the capping here.
The two front base plates need to also be removed and to access certainly the right hand front one
we need to remove the fuel filler nozzle neck out of there to access the rivet holes.
The capping that runs across the top of the body again there's a couple of tricks where
actually retained or hidden underneath this ROPS foot and the only way to access them is to
basically grind off their bases and then remove the capping.
So I reckon that's they're probably the main pitfalls and then we'll just create a
step-by-step top you have to drill a hole.
To get to those things yeah which might be nice actually I've done two here to access
the underside of the rivet which allowed me to grind off the rivet and then I could remove this.
To re-install it we will move the rivet point to here and we might put two more in here
but we'll do that before this gets painted all right.
